li.label: I have a minor title
li.description: My title gives me a little more standing among the colony.

li.label: I have a honorary title
li.description: My title marks me as someone of recognized status in the colony.

li.label: I am nobility
li.description: My noble title affirms my place above common colonists.

li.label: I am high nobility
li.description: My high noble title grants me a place of real prominence in the colony.

li.label: I have royal standing
li.description: My royal title gives me prestige that few in the colony can claim.

li.label: I have sovereign authority
li.description: My title places me at the height of the colony's social order.

li.label: family member has a minor title
li.description: A close family member's title gives our family a little more standing among the colony.

li.label: family member has honorary standing
li.description: A close family member's title marks our family as one of recognized status in the colony.

li.label: family member is nobility
li.description: A close family member's noble title raises our family above common colonists.

li.label: family member is high nobility
li.description: A close family member's high noble title gives our family real prominence in the colony.

li.label: family member is a royal
li.description: A close family member's royal title gives our family prestige that few in the colony can claim.

li.label: family member is a sovereign
li.description: A close family member's title places our family at the height of the colony's social order.
